title: Serene MC
description: A vanilla+ modpack that is inspired by sensible MC.
body:
**What is Serene MC?**

Serene Mc is a vanilla+ modpack inspired by the modpack Sensible MC ([https://modrinth.com/modpack/sensible-modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sensible-modpack))

**Why choose Serene MC?**

The biggest reason you should pick Serene MC is because of the suggestions, this modpack will get updated based on the communities suggestions in discord.

**What mods are in this modpack?**

Although its a very long list (184 mods), here they are:
